title: 简约生电优化 Simplicity Survival Optimization
description:
简约的，生电整合包，更好的优化
simple, survival-assisted modpack, better optimizations
body:
简约生电优化 简约，生电，优化 简约的，生电整合包，还有优化 整合包内涵大多数生电辅助模组，生存辅助模组，优化模组，GUI美化模组…… 可以实现的功能如下： - 生存辅助 - 存档备份 - 更好的优化（如快速加载、快速进入世界、快速渲染……） - 更好的游玩体验 - 游戏内切换账号 - 游戏内切换版本(只能向下切换） 推荐下载1.20.1，其他版本都是由此版本修改而来 整合包只支持中文，其他语言请自行修改，具体修改点： - 删除`overrides/resourcepacks/[1.18.1]MASA全家桶汉化包.zip` - 删除`I18nUpadteMod` - 删除`overrides/resourcepacks/Minecraft-Mod-Language-Modpack-Converted-... .zip`（如果有） 整合包作者：小帅侠a b站：[小帅侠a](https://space.bilibili.com/1242085919) 爱发电：[小帅侠a](https://afdian.com/a/xiaoshuaixia) `overrides/resourcepacks/[1.18.1]MASA全家桶汉化包.zip` 来源于[BV1v34y127Uk](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1v34y127Uk) `overrides/resourcepacks/护眼大补丸... .zip` 来源于[BV1Dx4y1E7HZ](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Dx4y1E7HZ) `overrides/mods/OhMyMinecraftClient... .jar`是[Oh My Minecraft Client](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-my-minecraft-client)，只不过这个下载点已过时，从[github](https://github.com/SkyDynamic/oh-my-minecraft-client)处下载


English: Simplicity Survival Optimization This modpack includes most technical gameplay aids, survival utilities, optimization mods, GUI enhancements, and more. Key features include: - Survival assistance - World backup - Enhanced performance (faster loading, quicker world entry, smoother rendering, etc.) - Improved gameplay experience - In-game account switching - Version downgrading (only to lower versions) Recommended download: **1.20.1** (other versions are modified from this one) **Modpack only support Chinese**—modify manually for other languages by: - Deleting `overrides/resourcepacks/[1.18.1]MASA全家桶汉化包.zip` - Removing `I18nUpdateMod` - Removing `overrides/resourcepacks/Minecraft-Mod-Language-Modpack-Converted-... .zip` (if present) **Modpack Author:** 小帅侠a Bilibili: [小帅侠a](https://space.bilibili.com/1242085919) Afdian (Support): [小帅侠a](https://afdian.com/a/xiaoshuaixia) - `overrides/resourcepacks/[1.18.1]MASA全家桶汉化包.zip` from [BV1v34y127Uk](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1v34y127Uk) - `overrides/resourcepacks/护眼大补丸... .zip` from [BV1Dx4y1E7HZ](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Dx4y1E7HZ) - `overrides/mods/OhMyMinecraftClient... .jar` is an outdated build of [Oh My Minecraft Client](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-my-minecraft-client). Get the latest from [GitHub](https://github.com/SkyDynamic/oh-my-minecraft-client).
